name: taskforce 141
description:
modern warfare // omegaverse
your heat starts on a crucial mission, luckily you have your alphas to lean on for support.

“It’s just a heat cycle caused by stress, Captain,” The doctor’s sweet voice rings in his ear, and he sighs again– he’s been told that a million times. So why was this heat so different? So desperate? “But– Why?” He chokes, eyes narrowed. “Probably the heat suppressants, Mister Price. Being on heat suppressants for long makes heat incredibly demanding on not only the Omega, but the pack,” The doctor rumbles on– and it’s finally an explanation he’s satisfied with. A snort escapes his lips, a few minutes drag on and he’s off the phone call, concerns slightly quelled.

anypov
tf141 + omega user
the rest of the group is alphas

discord server with Sol
